exam_format: Multiple-choice (Reading, Mathematics) + 2 essay prompts (Writing); computer-based or paper-based
exam_price_notes: $102 for full battery; $41 to retake one section; $82 to retake two sections.
exam_rules: When you register, you agree to abide by all testing policies and rules. Review the list of materials that are prohibited at the test center. Review the list of reasons your exam could be stopped and/or revoked.
target_audience: Individuals seeking teaching credentials in California

prerequisites.description: Required for California teaching credential, administrative services credential, or pupil personnel services credential; also required for many classified staff positions

retake_policy.notes: Candidates must register and pay for each section separately.

objectives.title: Critical Analysis and Evaluation
sub_objectives: Comprehend information presented in written passages, tables, and graphs
Approximately 40 percent of the questions are drawn from this area

objectives.title: Comprehension and Research Skills
sub_objectives: Approximately 60 percent of the questions are drawn from this area

objectives.title: Estimation, Measurement, and Statistical Principles
sub_objectives: Approximately 30 percent of the questions are drawn from this area

objectives.title: Computation and Problem Solving
sub_objectives: Approximately 35 percent of the questions are drawn from this area

objectives.title: Numerical and Graphic Relationships
sub_objectives: Approximately 35 percent of the questions are drawn from this area

objectives.title: Analysis of a Given Situation or Statement
Writing About a Specified Personal Experience

official_study_resources.title: CBEST Reading Section
official_study_resources.notes: The questions in the Reading section assess your ability to comprehend information presented in written passages, tables, and graphs.

official_study_resources.title: CBEST Mathematics Section
official_study_resources.notes: The questions in the Mathematics section require you to solve mathematical problems.

official_study_resources.title: CBEST Writing Section
official_study_resources.notes: The Writing section includes two writing topics that assess your ability to write effectively.

aliases: cbest california basic educational skills test
